article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.6. Attachment 2 - Housing Target Progress Report Form 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby's First Housing Target Progress Report to BC Province
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on approving and submitting its first Housing Target Progress Report to the BC provincial government. The report covers September 2025 to February 2026 and shows 910 net new homes were completed — a strong early result under the province's Housing Supply Act.
briefs.action_required: If you work in construction or development in Burnaby, review the new Height-Based Development Framework and permit portal changes.
